summary: MR Module Phase 2 Testing Complete - All MR Panel features working. MR Login, Dashboard, Customers, Visits (record with outcomes), Follow-ups (tabs for today/overdue/upcoming), Visual Aids deck browsing, and Slideshow presentation mode all tested successfully. Backend: 27/27 API tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows working.

issues: First slide shows 'No image' - slides may not have images uploaded. The slideshow functionality itself works correctly with navigation buttons and progress bar.

seed_data_creation: Test visits created during testing with 'TEST_' prefix in notes for identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: MR Module Phase 2 fully tested. MR Panel routes at /mrvet/*: login, dashboard, customers, visits, followups, visual-aids, slideshow/{deckId}. MR uses separate JWT token (type='mr') stored in localStorage as 'mr_token' and 'mr_user'. Test MR is assigned to Tamil Nadu state with Chennai/Coimbatore districts. 1 doctor (Dr. Test Address) and 1 visual aid deck ('Large Animal Injections' with 4 slides) available in test MR's territory.

features_tested.MR Login Page (/mrvet/login): PASS - Phone+password login with proper form validation, error handling
features_tested.MR Dashboard (/mrvet/dashboard): PASS - Welcome message, stats cards (Customers, Today Visits, Pending Follow-ups, Active Decks), Quick Actions, Territory Summary
features_tested.MR Customers (/mrvet/customers): PASS - Territory-filtered customers grouped by type (doctor/medical/agency), search functionality, type filter
features_tested.MR Visits (/mrvet/visits): PASS - Visit log display, New Visit modal with customer search/selection, outcome buttons (interested/not_interested/order_placed/follow_up_required), follow-up date field when outcome is follow_up_required
features_tested.MR Visit Recording: PASS - Created visit with customer selection, notes, and outcome, visit appears in log after save
features_tested.MR Follow-ups (/mrvet/followups): PASS - Tabs for Today/Overdue/Upcoming, empty states displayed correctly
features_tested.MR Visual Aids (/mrvet/visual-aids): PASS - Deck cards with name, type badge, description, slide count, Present button
features_tested.MR Slideshow (/mrvet/slideshow/{deckId}): PASS - Full-screen overlay, Exit button, navigation (prev/next), slide indicators, progress bar, keyboard nav supported
features_tested.MR Sidebar Navigation: PASS - All nav items (Dashboard, Customers, Visual Aids, Visits, Follow-ups) clickable and working
features_tested.MR Logout: PASS - Sign Out button clears token and redirects to /mrvet/login
features_tested.Admin MR Management Regression: PASS - Page loads, shows MR list with territories
features_tested.Admin Visual Aids Regression: PASS - Page loads, shows deck cards
features_tested.Admin MR Reports Regression: PASS - Page loads, shows activity log with MR visits
